{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bleeding Phoenix eggs
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The eggs of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] are round crimson shapes that cling to landscapes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bleeding Phoenix eggs]] can re-form if broken apart.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
